misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 I remember people saying that Luffy had reached his final level with Gear 5 against Kaido, and that the gap to his EoS level was minimal. But this chapter, and also Egghead, still shows
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 I remember people saying that Luffy had reached his final level with Gear 5 against Kaido, and that the gap to his EoS level was minimal. But this chapter, and also Egghead, still shows that Luffy can achieve far more. Be it Joyboy's insane Haki or the fact that the Imu Fruit is so versatile. Luffy has a lot of room for improvement. EoS Luffy could easily low diffing his Wano version. Luffy still has so much potential to improve and become stronger. In both haki and devilfruit power.

misc.title: #ToriyamaAkira sensei #DragonBall I ended up keeping the entire Dragon Ball box setвАФ including the volume(26) with my cover illustrationвАФsealed in its box. Without even being able to unwrap it, withou
misc.text: #ToriyamaAkira sensei #DragonBall I ended up keeping the entire Dragon Ball box setвАФ including the volume(26) with my cover illustrationвАФsealed in its box. Without even being able to unwrap it, without ever touching the bookвА¶ Unable to show others the volume with my coverвА¶ Unable to even see it myselfвА¶ And yet, perhaps because of thatвА¶ I feel even more honored, more grateful, and more deeply movedвАФ to have been given this moment of appreciation and respect for the legendary mangaka sensei.

items.title: #ONEPIECE1179 I remember people saying that Luffy had reached his final level with Gear 5 against Kaido, and that the gap to his EoS level was minimal. But this chapter, and also Egghead, still shows
items.text: #ONEPIECE1179 I remember people saying that Luffy had reached his final level with Gear 5 against Kaido, and that the gap to his EoS level was minimal. But this chapter, and also Egghead, still shows that Luffy can achieve far more. Be it Joyboy's insane Haki or the fact that the Imu Fruit is so versatile. Luffy has a lot of room for improvement. EoS Luffy could easily low diffing his Wano version. Luffy still has so much potential to improve and become stronger. In both haki and devilfruit power.
